title: chopratejas/headroom
friendlyTitle: Headroom compresses context for AI agents
summary: Headroom is a context-compression layer for AI agents that compresses tool outputs, logs, RAG chunks, files, and conversation history before they reach the model.
friendlySummary: Headroom helps shrink the information an AI agent sends to a model, such as logs, files, and search results.
whyItMatters: Builders can use it as a library, proxy, wrapper, or MCP server to reduce token usage and keep long agent workflows cheaper and more manageable.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can make agent workflows cheaper and easier to run by using fewer tokens.
